name: ingest-linkedin-nightly
_fix_notes: 1. LIMIT removed from channel query
2. Column renamed to access_token
3. CRITICAL: Endpoint changed from /v2/posts to /v2/organizationalEntityShareStatistics
— /v2/posts returns content objects, NOT metrics. totalShareStatistics does not exist there.
— Aggregate stats live on organizationalEntityShareStatistics endpoint.
4. Date range added: timeIntervals param scoped to yesterday only (no more lifetime stats written as today's delta)
5. LinkedIn-Version header corrected to 202305 minimum for stats endpoint
6. Pagination added: count=100, loop on start offset while elements.length === count
7. Init - Channel State preserves channel_id after HTTP call
8. IF gate on presence of elements before Transform
9. Transform rewritten for organizationalEntityShareStatistics response shape
10. platform field included in DB upsert
11. ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE upsert
12. Failure log path added
REQUIRED OAuth scopes on LinkedIn token:
r_organization_social, r_organization_social_feed, rw_organization_admin
account_id must be numeric organization ID (not vanity URL slug)
NOTE: For per-post granularity (individual post stats), you need a second API call:
GET /v2/shareStatistics?q=shares&shares=List(urn:li:share:...) per post URN.
This workflow fetches aggregate org-level stats only — sufficient for daily channel metrics.

parameters.query: SELECT id AS channel_id, account_id, access_token FROM channels WHERE platform = 'linkedin' AND connected_status = 'connected';

INSERT INTO post_metrics (
  channel_id, platform, metric_date,
  reach, impressions, engagements, clicks,
  likes, comments, shares, saves,
  video_views, watch_time_seconds, profile_visits, follower_count,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.channel_id }}', '{{ $json.platform }}', '{{ $json.metric_date }}',
  {{ $json.reach }}, {{ $json.impressions }}, {{ $json.engagements }}, {{ $json.clicks }},
  {{ $json.likes }}, {{ $json.comments }}, {{ $json.shares }}, {{ $json.saves }},
  {{ $json.video_views }}, {{ $json.watch_time_seconds }}, {{ $json.profile_visits }}, {{ $json.follower_count }},
  '{{ $json.created_at }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (channel_id, metric_date)
DO UPDATE SET
  reach       = EXCLUDED.reach,
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  engagements = EXCLUDED.engagements,
  clicks      = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  likes       = EXCLUDED.likes,
  comments    = EXCLUDED.comments,
  shares      = EXCLUDED.shares,
  created_at  = EXCLUDED.created_at;

INSERT INTO action_log (action_type, resource_type, actor, actor_type, status, details, created_at)
VALUES ('workflow_execution', 'ingestion', 'n8n', 'system', 'success',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: "ingest-linkedin-nightly", metrics_count: $input.all().length }) }}',
  now());

INSERT INTO action_log (action_type, resource_type, actor, actor_type, status, details, created_at)
VALUES ('workflow_execution', 'ingestion', 'n8n', 'system', 'failure',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: "ingest-linkedin-nightly", error: $json.error }) }}',
  now());
